title: Rose Gold [fix]
description: Simple Recipe Fix created for the mod "Rose Gold". It adds a ton of new itens that's slightly better than Iron tools.
body:
Simple fix for the [Rose Gold](https://modrinth.com/mod/rose-gold) Mod.
The Minecraft can't handle the way the original mod recipe's was created, So I decided to fix it. All the others things was unchanged, So checkout the original Mod, but here's a overview:

The Mod introduces a brand new Item Material Called "Rose Gold Allow". You can make it by using 4 copper ingots and 4 gold ingots, just like the Netherite Ingot. You can use it in the smithing table by putting it with any Iron tool or armor, along with the brand new "Rose Gold Upgrade" to make any Rose Gold tool or armor. The new "Rose Gold Upgrade" Is an exclusive treasure looting item, but can be multiplied. These Tools and armor set is slightly better than the Iron tool set relative.

For More Details and credits, check the original Mod.
